title: Use One AI as the CEO, Another as the Worker
summary: A technique for multi-agent AI systems where one agent assumes a management or coordinator role (CEO) while another executes tasks (Worker). This hierarchical approach enables task delegation and specialized role-based operations in AI agent architectures.
